name: carbonsense-workspace
description: CarbonSense X — Carbon Footprint Awareness and Applied AI Behavioral Optimization Platform

scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace=@carbonsense/core && npm run build --workspace=@carbonsense/shared-types && npm run build --workspace=@carbonsense/knowledge-base && npm run build --workspace=@carbonsense/ai-orchestration && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
